'''zolapaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:knackery|knackery]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knackery|knackery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zolapaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolapithi|zolapithi]] || [[word:zolapiji|zolapiji]] || [[word:zolapishi|zolapishi]] || [[word:zolapiki|zolapiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolaputhuthu|zolaputhuthu]] || [[word:zolapujuju|zolapujuju]] || [[word:zolapushushu|zolapushushu]] || [[word:zolapukuku|zolapukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolaputhu|zolaputhu]] || [[word:zolapuju|zolapuju]] || [[word:zolapushu|zolapushu]] || [[word:zolapuku|zolapuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolapufthuf|zolapufthuf]] || [[word:zolapufjuf|zolapufjuf]] || [[word:zolapufshuf|zolapufshuf]] || [[word:zolapufkuf|zolapufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolapethe|zolapethe]] || [[word:zolapeje|zolapeje]] || [[word:zolapeshe|zolapeshe]] || [[word:zolapeke|zolapeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolapothotho|zolapothotho]] || [[word:zolapojojo|zolapojojo]] || [[word:zolaposhosho|zolaposhosho]] || [[word:zolapokoko|zolapokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolapotho|zolapotho]] || [[word:zolapojo|zolapojo]] || [[word:zolaposho|zolaposho]] || [[word:zolapoko|zolapoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolapofthof|zolapofthof]] || [[word:zolapofjof|zolapofjof]] || [[word:zolapofshof|zolapofshof]] || [[word:zolapofkof|zolapofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfthÃŸf|zolapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfjÃŸf|zolapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfshÃŸf|zolapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfkÃŸf|zolapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zolapÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zolapÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zolapÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zolapÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfthÃŸf|zolapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfjÃŸf|zolapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfshÃŸf|zolapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfkÃŸf|zolapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfthÃŸf|zolapÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfjÃŸf|zolapÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfshÃŸf|zolapÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zolapÃŸfkÃŸf|zolapÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zolapÃḊthÃḊ|zolapÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zolapÃḊjÃḊ|zolapÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zolapÃḊshÃḊ|zolapÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zolapÃḊkÃḊ|zolapÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zolapathatha|zolapathatha]] || [[word:zolapajaja|zolapajaja]] || [[word:zolapashasha|zolapashasha]] || [[word:zolapakaka|zolapakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zolapatha|zolapatha]] || [[word:zolapaja|zolapaja]] || [[word:zolapasha|zolapasha]] || [[word:zolapaka|zolapaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zolapafthaf|zolapafthaf]] || [[word:zolapafjaf|zolapafjaf]] || [[word:zolapafshaf|zolapafshaf]] || [[word:zolapafkaf|zolapafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zolapasha|zolapasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zolapshÃḋsha|zolapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zolaprosha|zolaprosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zolapmusha|zolapmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zolapyasha|zolapyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozolapnkshÃḋsha|gozolapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozolapnkrosha|gozolapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozolapnkmusha|gozolapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozolapnkyasha|gozolapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zolalapasha|zolalapasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zolalapshÃḋsha|zolalapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zolalaprosha|zolalaprosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zolalapmusha|zolalapmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zolalapyasha|zolalapyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozolalapnkshÃḋsha|gozolalapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozolalapnkrosha|gozolalapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozolalapnkmusha|gozolalapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozolalapnkyasha|gozolalapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zelÃḊpasha|zelÃḊpasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zelÃḊpshÃḋsha|zelÃḊpshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zelÃḊprosha|zelÃḊprosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zelÃḊpmusha|zelÃḊpmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zelÃḊpyasha|zelÃḊpyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozelÃḊpnkshÃḋsha|gozelÃḊpnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozelÃḊpnkrosha|gozelÃḊpnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozelÃḊpnkmusha|gozelÃḊpnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozelÃḊpnkyasha|gozelÃḊpnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zolfapasha|zolfapasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zolfapshÃḋsha|zolfapshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zolfaprosha|zolfaprosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zolfapmusha|zolfapmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zolfapyasha|zolfapyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozolfapnkshÃḋsha|gozolfapnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozolfapnkrosha|gozolfapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozolfapnkmusha|gozolfapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozolfapnkyasha|gozolfapnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
